title: OSF MTConnect DataItem -> SM-attribute map — v2.0
description: Shape of mappings/mtconnect-dataitem-map.json, the SSOT for how an MTConnect DataItem projects onto a canonical SM attribute. Consumers (discovery's mtconnect probe, the gen-flows exporter) MUST read this file instead of carrying their own copy of the table — a hardcoded duplicate is what let Act_Status_Machine drift to Int32 while the CNC profile said String (audit 2026-07-08). Referential integrity (every smAttribute exists on profileRef, and every sources/mtconnect/*.json agrees with this table) is checked by ci/lint-mtconnect-canon.mjs, not here.

profileRef.description: Profile whose attributes this table projects onto. Every smAttribute below must be an attribute of it (or of one of its parents).

mappings.description: One entry per (DataItem suffix, SM attribute) pair. A suffix MAY repeat: the EXECUTION DataItem drives three derived attributes. Consumers match the LONGEST suffix first.

dataItemSuffix.description: DataItem id minus its device-id prefix, leading hyphen included (e.g. `-spindle-speed`).

valueMap.description: Discrete-value projection (raw MTConnect value -> SM value). The `*` key is the default for unlisted values. Values must match dataType — enforced by ci/lint-mtconnect-canon.mjs.
